svg.text: felt puzzle kits · a Giant Insect World collection

g.text: A fuzzle is a felt puzzle. Every kit is a set of felt
squares plus a printed template. Trace the shapes onto
felt, cut them out, and lay them on the mat to build a
life-like British minibeast — then take it apart and
build it again, like Lego. No glue or stitching needed.
Print a kit's template on A4 (landscape) at 100%.
Trace each shape onto the matching colour of felt.
Build your creature on the mat — and rebuild any time.

svg.text: Reference photos from iNaturalist under CC0 / CC-BY, credited in each kit · Logo © Giant Insect World
